examples: As we all know by now, these theories of doom are bunkum.
Given a surfeit of green PR bunkum, it is not easy to know whether they mean what they say.
He spun this fancy tale about how this beautiful maiden saved his life, but it was all bunkum.
The claim that study of these two languages trains the mind as no other can is bunkum.
All this talk about reducing Medicare and Social Security is bunkum.
